title: Transformer models for scientific retrieval
abstract: Dense retrieval can improve recall on scholarly corpora.
full_text: Transformer models for scientific retrieval. Dense retrieval can improve recall on scholarly corpora and pair well with reranking.

title: BM25 baselines for information retrieval
abstract: Lexical ranking remains strong on many benchmarks.
full_text: BM25 baselines for information retrieval remain competitive, especially when tuned over title and abstract or full text.

title: Cross-encoder reranking for passage retrieval
abstract: Cross-encoders improve precision on top candidates.
full_text: Cross-encoder reranking for passage retrieval often improves nDCG by rescoring the top candidates from lexical or dense retrievers.

title: Temporal drift in evolving corpora
abstract: Collections change over time and require longitudinal evaluation.
full_text: Temporal drift in evolving corpora motivates longitudinal evaluation and snapshot-aware benchmarking for scientific search.

title: Citation graphs and future retrieval systems
abstract: Citation-aware priors may help future time-aware systems.
full_text: Citation graphs and time-aware priors may help future retrieval systems, but they are not part of the run one baseline.
